subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous battle was fought between the Mughal Emperor Aurangzeb and the Maratha Empire?
question_hi: मुगल मुखपुत्र Aurangzeb और मराठा संघ के बीच क्या भागीय हिल हुआ था ?
explanation_en: The Battle of Karauli took place between Aurangzeb and the Maratha Empire.
explanation_hi: Aurangzeb aur मराठों के बीटी में कारौली हिल हुई थी।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the founder of Jodhpur State?
question_hi: जोधपुर किसेंटर किसनों के लिएचैट कित्तेवाली हुई थी।
explanation_en: Rao Kailash was the founder of Jodhpur State.
explanation_hi: राव कालालाश जोधपुर के लिएकैलाश की उत्तरराजगंगना
